---
title: "My First Quarto Practice"
format: html
editor: visual
---

\# Introduction

\`\``{r}#| echo: truesummary(cars)`\`\`\`

\# Scatterplot\
\
\`\``{r}#| label: fig-cars#| fig-cap: "Relationship between speed and stopping distance"plot(cars$speed, cars$dist)`\`\`\`\
\
As shown in \@fig-cars, stopping distance increases as speed increases.
